arts.ttl: Valencia star’s father speaks out on Atlético Madrid links
arts.sum: The father of Valencia star Javi Guerra has on Thursday spoken out on the player’s ongoing links with La Liga rivals Atlético Madrid. The name of midfielder Guerra of course…

arts.ttl: Preview: Valencia vs. Real Valladolid - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's La Liga clash between Valencia and Real Valladolid, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
